hero.title2: Let's wake up your follicles again.
hero.desc: PRP hair treatment uses your own blood platelets to support thicker growth. A doctor-guided option for early hair thinning in Kuala Lumpur.
hero.qa1Q: Does PRP work for hair loss?
hero.qa1A: Can help many with thinning hair, results vary
hero.qa2A: Less shedding first, visible growth in months

whatIs.title: What is PRP Hair Treatment?
whatIs.desc: PRP means platelet-rich plasma. Platelets are tiny parts of your blood that carry growth factors.
whatIs.s1Desc: Small blood sample taken from your arm, like a normal blood test
whatIs.s2Desc: Blood is spun to separate layers and concentrate platelets
whatIs.s3Desc: PRP injected into thinning areas with precise, controlled injections

whoFor.title: Who PRP Hair Treatment Is For
whoFor.w1: Notice gradual thinning at the crown or part line
whoFor.w2: See a widening hair part or weaker ponytail volume
whoFor.w3: Have early male or female pattern hair loss
whoFor.w4: Want a non-surgical hair restoration option
whoFor.w5: Support results after a hair transplant
whoFor.considDesc: PRP may not be suitable if you have:
whoFor.c1: Very low platelets or certain blood-related conditions
whoFor.c2: Active infection at the treatment area
whoFor.c3: Certain serious medical conditions where injections are not advised

timeline.title: What to Expect
timeline.desc: PRP is slow, because hair growth is slow. Here's a realistic timeline:
timeline.t3Desc: Clearer changes in density and thickness

sessions.s1: One session each month for 3 months
sessions.costNote: per session, depending on clinic and add-ons

faq.a1: For many people with thinning hair, it can help. Some see regrowth, some see less shedding.
faq.a2: Quick pinches or pressure across the scalp. Most people return to normal activities the same day.
faq.q3: What happens if you stop PRP?
faq.a3: If PRP helped, stopping may lead to gradual loss again. Maintenance supports longer-term results.
faq.a4: Not usually a one-time fix. Often needs repeat sessions to maintain benefits.
faq.a5: Light exercise is often fine the next day. Wait a few days for intense workouts.
faq.q6: Can I wash my hair after PRP?
faq.a6: Gentle shampoo next morning is often recommended. Follow your clinician's instructions.

cta.title: Start Your Hair Restoration Journey
